name: fluxgate-proxy-docs
description: Documentation for fluxgate-proxy — a high-performance 5G SBI / 4G Diameter signaling proxy: policy, transformation, content-based routing, and rate limiting at wire speed.

scripts.dev: node scripts/build-metrics.mjs && node scripts/build-cli.mjs && node scripts/build-pagemeta.mjs && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs && node scripts/build-sitemap.mjs && vite
scripts.build: node scripts/build-metrics.mjs && node scripts/build-cli.mjs && node scripts/build-pagemeta.mjs && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs && node scripts/build-sitemap.mjs && tsc -b && vite build
